programmes.show_description: An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Christmas romance with Jill Wagner. Juggling her career with being a single mum leaves Maggie with little time for love. But is a Christmas wish - and her son's tutor - about to change that? (2017)
Carly bumps into her college crush and asks her new friend Nick on how to impress him. But is she sure she's got the right man? Starring Janel Parrish. (2021)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
New York playboy Oliver needs to clear up his image by dating Avery, a respectable socialite. Will this unluckily pairing turn into anything more? (2023)
